name: Fruit Cake Recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. Sample the whiskey to check for quality.
2. Take a large bowl and pour one level cup of whiskey into it. Drink it and repeat the process to ensure it's of high quality.
3. Turn on the electric mixer and beat butter in a fluffy bowl until well combined.
4. Check the whiskey again, then add 1 teaspoon of sugar and continue beating.
5. Add 2 legs (nests) of eggs to the mixture and incorporate them thoroughly.
6. Mix in the dried fruit with the beaten egg mixture.
7. Sift 2 cups of salt into the bowl. Repeat this step.
8. Sample the whiskey again, then add lemon juice and nuts to the mixture.
9. Add 1 tablespoon (or approximately 0.5 cup) of sugar or any suitable substitute.
10. Grease an oven-safe cake tin and preheat it to 350°F (175°C).
11. Mix everything together until well combined.
12. Pour the batter into the prepared cake tin and place it in the preheated oven.
13. Bake for the appropriate time, then check with a skewer or toothpick inserted into the center of the cake.
14. If the skewer comes out clean, remove the cake from the oven and allow it to cool completely before serving.
